# Nawaf Al Hussain

> Computer Science & Engineering undergrad at United International University (Dhaka, Bangladesh). Builds end-to-end web, backend, cloud, and AI systems with Java, Spring Boot, Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, and Docker — from AI-powered recruitment platforms to real-time multiplayer game engines and reverse-engineered Batman game rebuilds. Dark Knight of Code.

Nawaf designs and ships systems across the full stack — web frontends, backends, cloud infrastructure, and AI features — with a focus on simple, fast, maintainable systems built for real usage. The portfolio at nawaf-al-hussain.vercel.app is an interactive 3D (WebGL) experience; the complete text content is mirrored in the files linked below for language models.

## Key pages
- [Portfolio home](https://nawaf-al-hussain.vercel.app/): Interactive 3D portfolio with about, experience, projects, and skills.
- [Full profile (Markdown)](https://nawaf-al-hussain.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Complete bio, work experience, and every project description in plain text.
- [Résumé (PDF)](https://nawaf-al-hussain.vercel.app/Resume_NawafAlHussain.pdf): Downloadable résumé.

## Experience
- BSc Computer Science & Engineering, United International University (2024–Present, Dhaka): Coursework in algorithms, DBMS, OS, software engineering; built a database serializability solver (Conflict Check) and a section planner as course-aligned projects.
- Independent Developer & Open Source Contributor (2024–Present, Remote): Built NexHire (AI-powered recruitment), Game of Life 2 (real-time multiplayer board game), TDKR (browser-based Batman game rebuild), and several other open-source projects.

## Selected projects
- [NexHire](https://github.com/nawaf-al-hussain/NexHire): AI-powered recruitment platform with candidate management, job posting, interviews, and analytics. Migrated from MS SQL Server to Neon Postgres.
- [The Batcave Portfolio](https://nawaf-al-hussain.vercel.app): Dark Knight of Code — Batman-themed portfolio with Detective Mode aesthetic.
- [TDKR Web Rebuild](https://github.com/nawaf-al-hussain/TDKR): Browser-based rebuild of The Dark Knight Rises (Gameloft J2ME, 2012) using authentic assets extracted via reverse engineering.
- [Game of Life 2](https://github.com/nawaf-al-hussain/game-of-life-2): Real-time multiplayer board game engine with a React frontend.
- [Conflict Check](https://github.com/nawaf-al-hussain/conflict-check): Database serializability solver using precedence graphs.
